query:
SELECT 'esignature_documents' as tbl, COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'esignature_documents' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reputation_reviews', COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reputation_reviews' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ooo_detections', COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ooo_detections' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
UNION ALL
SELECT 'web_forms', COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'web_forms' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
ORDER BY tbl, COLUMN_NAME;
